response.justification: The candidate is a seasoned generalist engineer (~18 years) with strong TypeScript/Node.js, AWS, and full-stack delivery experience, and his current role involves MCP code generators and agentic-workflow infrastructure, which maps directly to key technologies in this role. However, the position requires 8+ years building production AI-driven solutions, while his AI-specific exposure appears limited to roughly the past year; there is no demonstrated experience with RAG architectures, vector databases, LLM evaluation pipelines, or multi-agent frameworks. His teaching, workshop, and consulting background suggests aptitude for the customer-facing side, but the AI depth gap is significant for a staff-level GenAI role.
strengths: Hands-on MCP and agentic-workflow tooling experience at current staff-level role
18+ years of production engineering across TypeScript, Node.js, AWS, and distributed systems
Strong communication and mentoring track record (workshops, courses, conference talks)
concerns: Falls far short of the required 8+ years building AI-driven solutions
No demonstrated RAG, vector database, or LLM evaluation/observability experience
No evidence of leading enterprise customer discovery or forward-deployed delivery work

key_factors.factor: Deep general engineering and cloud (AWS/TypeScript) background
